text_excerpt: In Parliament - Samantha Dixon Skip to main content Join Get Involved Donate Home About My plan News Latest Updates Newsletters In Parliament Latest Activity Visit Parliament Cost of Living Contact Office Standards River Dee Bathing Water Status More Menu In Parliament Sam Dixon Committee Room If you would like to visit Parliament and learn more about the building’s history and our democracy, please fill in the form below. Constituents are able to request a free Inside UK Parliament guided tour, and my office will do their best to accommodate based on availability. Visit Parliament First name Last name Email address Telephone number What would you like to do on your visit? I can help try and arrange an official tour and I can try to book you tickets to view the activity in the House of Commons from the viewing gallery. Let me know how we can help: Tour Gallery tickets What's your address in Chester North and Neston? Address line 1 Address line 2 City Post code Details of your visit: When would you like to come, how many tickets would like and do you have any access requirements?
